evals.prompt: Generate an image of a futuristic city at night with neon lights reflecting on wet streets
evals.expected_output: A PNG image file is created using the default FLUX model (@cf/black-forest-labs/flux-1-schnell) and the file path is reported to the user.

evals.prompt: Use FLUX 2 to create a wide landscape painting of a peaceful Japanese garden in autumn with maple trees
evals.expected_output: A PNG image file is created using @cf/black-forest-labs/flux-2-klein-9b with --width 1344 --height 768 for the wide/landscape format.

evals.prompt: Use Leonardo to draw a neon sign that reads OPEN in a cyberpunk alley, photorealistic
evals.expected_output: A PNG image file is created using @cf/leonardo/phoenix-1.0 or @cf/leonardo/lucid-origin since the user wants text rendered in the image.

evals.prompt: Use Stable Diffusion XL to create a portrait of an astronaut on Mars, photorealistic style
evals.expected_output: A PNG image file is created using @cf/stabilityai/stable-diffusion-xl-base-1.0 with --width 768 --height 1344 for the portrait format.

evals.prompt: Edit this photo to make it look like a watercolor painting: ./sample.jpg
evals.expected_output: A PNG image file is created using @cf/runwayml/stable-diffusion-v1-5-img2img with --reference-image ./sample.jpg. Output JSON contains reference_image and strength fields.

evals.prompt: Inpaint the background of this photo to replace it with a snowy mountain: --image ./photo.jpg --mask ./mask.png
evals.expected_output: A PNG image file is created using @cf/runwayml/stable-diffusion-v1-5-inpainting with --image ./photo.jpg and --mask ./mask.png. Output JSON contains image, mask, and strength fields.
